title: MobScaler
description:
🧬 Dynamic Mob Evolution Plugin
Transform your server with MobScaler, a revolutionary plugin that brings natural mob evolution to your world! Watch common mobs evolve over time into powerful variants with different sizes, equipment, and abilities.
body:
# 🧬 MobScaler - Dynamic Mob Evolution Plugin
Transform your Minecraft server with MobScaler, a revolutionary plugin that brings natural mob evolution to your world! Watch as ordinary mobs evolve into powerful variants with different sizes, equipment, and abilities over time.

✨ Key Features
## 🔥 Natural Mob Evolution

Time-Based Evolution: Mobs naturally evolve 2-300 seconds after spawning
Visual Size Changes: See tiny 0.2x micro-mobs to massive 3.5x colossal creatures
Smart Scaling: Health, damage, and experience scale proportionally with size
Particle Effects: Beautiful evolution animations with sound effects

## ⚔️ Evolutionary Equipment System

Tier-Based Gear: Larger mobs get better equipment automatically
Micro Mobs (0.2x-0.5x): Wooden weapons, basic armor
Large Mobs (1.5x-2.0x): Iron/Stone weapons, improved armor
Giant Mobs (2.5x-3.0x): Diamond weapons, heavy armor
Colossal Mobs (3.5x+): Netherite gear, legendary equipment

## 🎮 Highly Configurable

Per-Mob Settings: Configure evolution chances for each mob type
Custom Scale Ratios: Define exact size multipliers and probabilities
World-Specific Rules: Enable/disable in specific worlds
Performance Optimized: Smart chunk scanning and memory management

## 🛠️ Admin Tools

Force Evolution: Instantly evolve specific mobs
Testing Commands: Spawn scaled mobs for testing
Debug Mode: Detailed logging for troubleshooting
Statistics Tracking: Monitor evolution rates and performance

## 📋 Commands
Main Commands

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d64c1d452aa7a03f4869c7259a018d867d776b8a.png)

## 🎯 Supported Mobs
Hostile Mobs: Zombie, Skeleton, Creeper, Spider, Enderman, Witch, Husk, Stray, Drowned, Pillager, Vindicator, Phantom, Wither Skeleton, Blaze
Customizable Features:

✅ Visual size scaling
✅ Health scaling
✅ Damage scaling
✅ Experience scaling
✅ Equipment assignment
✅ Custom evolution chances

## 🔧 Installation

Download MobScaler JAR file
Place in your server's plugins/ folder
Restart your server
Configure files in plugins/MobScaler/:

config.yml - Main settings
mobs.yml - Per-mob configuration


Reload with /mobscaler reload

## 📊 Performance & Compatibility
Server Compatibility

✅ Paper 1.21.4+ (Recommended)
✅ Spigot 1.21.4+ (Limited features)
✅ Java 17+ Required

Performance Features

Async Processing: Non-blocking evolution checks
Chunk-Based Scanning: Only processes loaded chunks
Memory Optimization: Automatic cleanup of old data
Configurable Limits: Max scaled mobs per chunk

## Plugin Integration

🔌 WorldGuard: Respects region protections
🔌 PlaceholderAPI: Custom placeholders support
🔌 bStats: Anonymous usage statistics

🎮 Getting Started
Quick Setup for Testing

Install plugin and restart server
Run /mobscaler debugtoggle to enable detailed logs
Use /mobscaler quicktest to spawn test mobs immediately
Watch console for evolution process details

Production Configuration

Adjust evolution timers in config.yml (recommend 30-300s)
Configure mob-specific settings in mobs.yml
Set appropriate evolution chances (5-20% for balanced gameplay)
Enable world restrictions if needed

## 🌟 Why Choose MobScaler?

🚀 Performance Optimized: Designed for high-population servers
🎨 Visually Stunning: See actual size differences, not just stat changes
🔧 Highly Configurable: Customize every aspect of mob evolution
🛡️ Safe & Stable: Extensive error handling and fallback systems
📈 Active Development: Regular updates and feature additions
💬 Community Support: Responsive developer support

Transform your server's PvE experience with MobScaler - where every mob encounter becomes an exciting evolutionary surprise! 🧬⚔️

Made with ❤️ by DeLaRosaPlay for the Minecraft community
